title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: An episode of the "Economics of AGI" podcast hosted by Dwarkesh Patel featuring economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discussing optimal taxation and wealth redistribution in a future where AI systems become highly capable. The discussion covers scenarios where AI productivity gains may not translate to larger economic shares for AI companies, integration challenges of humans into automated economies, and inequalities across nations in the AI supply chain.
